title: SilverHawk benchmark replication package
description: Replication package for the SilverHawk ADO benchmark (Ambrosini, submitted to Automation in Construction): per-run benchmark data, the Ambrosini GBR+ANN v2 building-performance surrogate, per-figure source data, and surrogate-training scripts.

creators.name: Ambrosini, Luciano
creators.affiliation: LA Architecture & Computational Design Consulting, Naples, Italy
